| Peter,
**WE HAVE ANOTHER BOLD GOAL FOR THIS THURSDAY**
** _PLEASE READ ABOUT MY FATHER'S PLANS BELOW_** Anyone who knows me knows exactly what I think about Donald J. Trump.

He is an amazing man - there is nobody I admire more. I consider him my best friend, and could not be more proud that he is my father.

[**Today, I am honored to kick off his most ambitious fundraising campaign yet**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11gJTqLL3UWoZONcXgIsy5Qcm).

Peter, Hillary Clinton's campaign machine and her liberal media allies are desperate. First, they claimed we raised too little. _**Then, when donors like you helped us to raise $11 million in just a few days, they claimed we were lying**_.

The truth is we did better than $11 million and no amount of spin from Crooked Hillary's machine can change that fact. _We cannot let them get away with this_.

**That's why we set another Trump-sized goal**. We are working to shatter records again this week - **by raising _another_ $10 million** before the Federal Election Commission's 2nd quarter fundraising deadline this **Thursday at midnight**. Afterwards, our results will be covered heavily by the media.

[**Join my father and me, and chip in a $10, $20, $50, $100, or $250 contribution today. Will you help us SHOCK Hillary Clinton and the political establishment?**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11gJXq76uEhTXNxoOQ6Oh4shX)

**[DONATE NOW](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11gK1psrVnDoVMhAGpva034ny)**
We are fighting as a family and a very fed-up country to build this historic effort, and bring voters over to Team Trump. The support of friends like you over the last week is making a huge impact.

Every day we're reaching more and more people, Peter - **convincing them that a Trump presidency will mean they can _finally_ believe in American again**.

I know that my father has the vision, determination and tenacity to get great things done for our country - something he's proven throughout his life and career. I've worked side by side with him in business, and I've watched him up close in action my entire life.

**Donald J. Trump is the man our nation needs in the White House at this moment. Please help us make history**.

No fight is too tough for my father. He had no problem taking on the political establishment to secure the Republican nomination, _and now he's going after Lying Crooked Hillary Clinton in a way that no one has ever gone after her before_.

[**I hope you will stand with us today by rushing a contribution using this secure link**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11gK5oNNm6YTTL1MxYTvJ1Gt9).

Thank you,

Eric Trump
Executive Vice President
The Trump Organization

name: Patty Murray
subject: Unquestionably the best choice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8955402232619073536/-4094310821977391104?refcode=e20160628&refcode2=e20160628nd&amount=25)
---
Friend,

Katie McGinty and I have a lot in common. We were both raised in working families. We both care deeply about the middle class, women's rights, and the environment. I was the first woman elected senator from Washington -- and with your help, Katie will be the first woman senator from Pennsylvania.

More importantly, **I need Katie with me in the Senate to fight for economic security for our families and seniors, against attacks on women 's and LGBT rights, and for a Supreme Court that upholds fairness and equality.**

[**That 's why I'm asking you to contribute whatever you can to help Katie fight before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline on June 30.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8955402232619073536/-4094310821977391104?refcode=e20160628&refcode2=e20160628nd&amount=25)

I've gotten to know Katie over the course of her campaign. And I can tell you this: **She is unquestionably the best choice to represent the people of Pennsylvania in the Senate.**

That's why Katie has been steadily gaining in the polls ever she announced her candidacy. She's now tied with Republican Pat Toomey.

But here's what worries me: Senator Toomey has millions of dollars in his campaign account, and even more coming in from right-wing Super PACs. They're already putting out ad after ad attacking Katie.

We Democrats can't match those ad dollars, but I know we can outwork Republicans on the ground -- where it counts. **We just need the resources to build a winning campaign.**

**So let 's do it. [Will you pitch in right now to help Katie fight for a future that is bright and just for all Pennsylvanians?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8955402232619073536/-4094310821977391104?refcode=e20160628&refcode2=e20160628nd&amount=25) Remember, the big FEC end-of-quarter deadline hits June 30.**

Thanks,

Patty Murray
U.S. Senator from Washington

name: Justice for Governor
subject: Pausing the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
Jim Justice Will Pause Campaign

Yesterday, Jim Justice issued the following statement regarding his campaign:

"Our state has been struck by an unbelievable disaster. I will be concentrating all of my efforts to help flood victims that have been decimated. Politicking is the last thing that’s on my mind at this tragic time. I will not be personally campaigning for at least the next two weeks. Our headquarters will remain open. We are asking everyone to do what they can for the West Virginia families affected by the flood."

How to help flood victims:
Jim has established a relief fund called Neighbors Loving Neighbors. Anyone interested in helping with Neighbors Loving Neighbors is asked to contact the Greenbrier County Emergency Shelter at 304-645-6999 or mail monetary donations to 3584 Davis Stuart Road, Lewisburg, WV, 24901.

Non-perishable food items can be dropped off at The Greenbrier Sports Performance Center, just across the street from the main property on Kate's Mountain Road. Donations can also be made online at www.therhemalife.com or by texting the amount you wish to give and the word "neighbor" to 501-697-4362.

subject: A story about Jimmy Carter and a story about Michael Dukakis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
if we are to believe history | Friend --

Let's take a trip down memory lane.

In 1980, President Jimmy Carter started with a massive lead in the polls -- even coming into June, he was up five points up on Ronald Reagan.

Reagan won by 10 points.

In 1988, Vice President George H.W. Bush was running against Michael Dukakis. Dukakis spent most of the spring and summer ahead by 10-12 points -- in the middle of July, Dukakis was ahead by 17 points.

Bush ended up winning with 53 percent of the vote.

So when you see polls that show us with a lead over Trump, you can be happy about that -- but don't get complacent or assume we have this thing in the bag. Four and a half months is a long time in presidential politics, and history has shown us: anything can happen. This race will be close and we have to be prepared for a tough fight.

subject: Hey There
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend, I'm counting on my team for help right now -- and that includes you.

With Thursday's FEC deadline looming, _everyone_ will be watching our fundraising numbers to see if we have the grassroots support to go up against Toomey and his Wall Street buddies.

**There isn 't much time, and we're still $23,618 short of our goal -- but I KNOW that we can rise to the occasion together, friend. [Can you chip in $5 to help?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8270002967747231744/-4309357704184332288?refcode=e20160628.3&refcode2=e20160628.3nda&amount=25)**

We're fighting hard -- every day -- so that Pennsylvania's working families can finally get a fair shake in Washington. Now we're neck-and-neck in this race, and we have to make this moment count.

All eyes are on us now -- let's show them what we can do.

Katie

Katie McGinty

Peter,

Eric Trump

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: President Obama said it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
No one says it better.

Dear Friend,

Last week, the president came to Washington state and delivered a powerful and passionate message. His words were an inspiration to me, and I hope they will be to you, too:

"I know Jay well, and I've seen his leadership up close....one of the reasons that I love Jay so much is because he doesn't just have what it takes to lead Washington state on a day-to-day basis -- he's willing to make the tough decisions that position this state to succeed in the long run. And that means sometimes making decisions that aren't immediately popular. It means sometimes taking risks. But that's the kind of public servant you want. You want somebody who's got a conscience and who's not just playing to the polls all the time." -- President Obama

Help keep this campaign moving forward. Contribute right now to help us reach our $15,000 goal by our official end-of-month deadline on June 30th.

Thank you,

Aisling Kerins

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Our delegates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends,
Before our nearly 1,900 delegates can vote at the Democratic convention next month, we need to actually get them to Philadelphia.
Here's the thing: our delegates are not wealthy campaign contributors. They're not party insiders or establishment elites. **They're working folks, and it's not easy for many of them to fly to Philly and stay in hotels for a week.**
We really need to have all of our delegates at the Democratic convention because we expect there could be critical votes for the party platform and electoral process. **We'd hate to fall short on these votes because some of our delegates couldn't afford to go to the convention.**
That's why I'm asking you directly:
[**Make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign before Thursday's midnight FEC deadline to help our delegates come to the Democratic convention so we can have our entire political revolution represented next month in Philadelphia.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full")
You'd be shocked at how expensive it is to attend the Democratic convention. It can cost more than $4,000 per delegate!
Hotels are booked months in advance, and then resold at higher prices. Lobbyists throw all sorts of fancy parties. It's easy for the political establishment to navigate this and know whom to call to find the right way in. That, or they're wealthy enough to pay for themselves.
Our political revolution is not made up of people like that. Our folks need help to get to the convention and stay there.
**You can make sure all our delegates represent Bernie at the Democratic convention. Can you help us beforeThursday's midnight FEC fundraising deadline?**
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign and make sure that Bernie's delegates can get to the Democratic convention next month.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full")
Thank you for stepping up to help the members of our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-delegates?refcode=em160628-full")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902").
